root_causes: Documented staging acceptance order contradicted the actual deploy topology.
CI contract checks were treated as proof of the deployed end-to-end data chain.
Environment, stable data identity and pre-write evidence were not mandatory merge inputs.
Real data correction, system diagnosis and acceptance were mixed in one loop.
No enforceable stop-the-line rule existed after an unexpected real-data mutation.
preventive_controls: Separated isolated integration, staging deployment and real staging acceptance
Mandatory environment and data identity evidence for source/writeback changes

rollback_plan: Revert the governance-only PR. No runtime, deployment configuration or external data is changed by this workpack.
